title: rabdosia serra
intro: Rabdosia serra, also known as Himalayan sage or Tibetan sage, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally used in Tibetan medicine, Rabdosia serra is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have cognitive-enhancing and anti-aging properties. Rabdosia serra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its health benefits, although its availability and use should be carefully managed due to its endangered status.
